notes: The game loads, the menus start rendering glitchy. There is no clearing on repaints, text overlay each other. When I managed to start a game, only greenish textures were visible with the same overlaying bug. Tried Esync, no change. Tried OpenGL, didn't even load then.
title: VERSUS SQUAD

notes: Install, Run, Play. Works perfectly OOB.
